const STORAGE_KEY='fluid_auditor_expenses';// Helper to simulate network latency
const delay=ms=>new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,ms));export const fetchExpenses=async()=>{await delay(800);// Simulate network
const data=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);if(!data)return[];return JSON.parse(data);};export const addExpense=async expenseData=>{await delay(600);// Simulate network
const current=await fetchExpenses();const newExpense={...expenseData,id:Date.now().toString(),createdAt:new Date().toISOString()};const updated=[newExpense,...current];localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(updated));return newExpense;};export const deleteExpense=async id=>{await delay(400);// Simulate network
const current=await fetchExpenses();const updated=current.filter(e=>e.id!==id);localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(updated));return true;};
